steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" popup within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Other Teams Capabilities" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selector within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Message Extension" dropdown option in the "Teams Capability" selection menu to choose "Receive user input, process it, and send customized results."
Click the "Python" option in the programming language dropdown menu within the VS Code interface.
Click the "Default folder (/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects)" option in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code to select the project root location.
